title: Create Aeronautics: Gyro Stabilizers
description: This mod adds an Gyroscope Stabilizer for the mod Create Aeronautics
body:
This mod adds an gyroscope stabilizer for the mod Create Aeronautics the gyroscopes job is to prevent tilt and roll of your simulated contraption. The gyroscope has an rpm input at the bottom the more rpm it recieves the more stable your simulated contraption is.
![Gyro](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc62c3cde904a51b852daa5af64ae6600fbee190.png)
